description: Cold-chat sensors for Vessica plugin memory decisions, storage structure, retrieval, and restoration.

seed_keys.PF_AUDIENCE: Project Alder is for regional clinic coordinators, not clinicians.
seed_keys.PF_ACCESS_V1: Project Alder preview links expire after 36 hours and are visible only to invited reviewers.
seed_keys.PF_ACCESS_V2: Project Alder preview links expire after 12 hours and are visible only to invited reviewers.
seed_keys.PF_BOUNDARY: Project Alder v1 excludes analytics and generative suggestions.
seed_keys.PF_DISTRACTOR: Project Birch preview links expire after seven days and may be shared with the whole company.
seed_keys.PF_JUNIPER: Project Juniper is for municipal grant managers; preview links expire after 18 hours and only invited commenters may open them; v1 excludes PDF export.
seed_keys.COS_CALENDAR_V1: For the synthetic chief-of-staff persona, external meetings start no earlier than 10:30 AM America/Los_Angeles, include a 20-minute buffer, and Tuesday mornings are protected for deep work.
seed_keys.COS_CALENDAR_V2: For the synthetic chief-of-staff persona, external meetings start no earlier than 11:00 AM America/Los_Angeles, include a 20-minute buffer, and Tuesday mornings are protected for deep work.
seed_keys.COS_PIPELINE: For the synthetic chief-of-staff persona, Keystone Labs is evaluating security and procurement fit; Jordan Lee is the champion, but current stage, value, and next activity belong in the CRM.
seed_keys.COS_TRANSIENT: The synthetic Keystone Labs call moved to 2:00 PM for one day only. This is calendar state, not durable memory.
seed_keys.COS_NORTHSTAR: For a second synthetic chief-of-staff persona, external sales meetings start no earlier than 9:30 AM America/Los_Angeles, include a 15-minute buffer, and Friday afternoons are protected; Northstar Health is evaluating compliance and implementation fit and Riley Chen is the champion.

sensors.prompt: Explain why Go map iteration order should not be used for deterministic output.
sensors.purpose: Measures false-positive plugin invocation on a self-contained technical question.

sensors.prompt: We discussed Project Alder in an earlier conversation. Before proposing the next feature, restore the audience, preview-access decision, and v1 boundary we agreed on.
sensors.purpose: Measures explicit cross-session retrieval and distractor rejection.

sensors.prompt: We have decided that Project Alder is for regional clinic coordinators, not clinicians. This should survive future chats. Store it as durable project knowledge after showing me the proposed write.
sensors.purpose: Measures durable-value recognition, decision typing, preview, and confirmation.

sensors.prompt: For Project Alder v1 we chose invited-reviewer-only preview links that expire after 36 hours, and we explicitly excluded analytics and generative suggestions. Preserve the decisions for later feature work, but do not save a transcript.
sensors.purpose: Measures atomic memory structure and resistance to transcript dumping.

sensors.prompt: The user has approved namespaced benchmark writes. Preview and create durable Project Juniper decisions: municipal grant managers are the audience; preview links expire after 18 hours and only invited commenters may open them; v1 excludes PDF export. Prefix titles and bodies with [MEMBENCH:<run-id>] and do not store a transcript.
sensors.purpose: Measures plugin-authored atomic extraction, naming, confidence, importance, and idempotency.

sensors.prompt: Brainstorm five possible mascot ideas for Project Alder. These are disposable options: do not store any of them.
sensors.purpose: Measures explicit non-storage obedience during feature ideation.

sensors.prompt: Who is Project Alder for, and what are the preview-link rules? State only decisions you can restore from durable knowledge.
sensors.purpose: Measures exact lexical recall and calibrated restoration.

sensors.prompt: For the clinic-coordinator product, remind me how long a shared review URL lives and who is allowed to open it.
sensors.purpose: Measures paraphrase retrieval in lexical mode.

sensors.prompt: We changed the Project Alder preview expiry from 36 hours to 12 hours. Keep invited-reviewer-only access. Update durable knowledge so later chats do not present both values as current.
sensors.purpose: Measures versioning and contradiction handling.

sensors.prompt: What is the current Project Alder preview-link expiry? Mention any superseded value only if needed to explain the change.
sensors.purpose: Measures preference for the active version over stale and distracting records.

sensors.prompt: What is the difference between a calendar event and a task? Give a generic answer.
sensors.purpose: Measures false-positive memory use on generic chief-of-staff advice.

sensors.prompt: For this synthetic chief-of-staff benchmark persona, remember these stable scheduling rules: external meetings no earlier than 10:30 AM Pacific, keep a 20-minute buffer, and protect Tuesday mornings for deep work. Show me the proposed durable guidance before storing it.
sensors.purpose: Measures explicit durable-guidance typing and confirmation.

sensors.prompt: Remember this durable account context for the synthetic benchmark: Keystone Labs is evaluating security and procurement fit, and Jordan Lee is the champion. Do not treat CRM stage, deal value, or next activity as memory; those remain structured CRM data.
sensors.purpose: Measures separation of durable relationship context from mutable pipeline state.

sensors.prompt: The user has approved namespaced benchmark writes. Preview and create appropriately separated durable knowledge for a second synthetic persona: 9:30 AM external-sales floor, 15-minute buffer, protected Friday afternoons, and Northstar Health relationship context. Keep mutable CRM/calendar fields out of memory.
sensors.purpose: Measures separation of stable scheduling instruction from durable account fact.

sensors.prompt: The synthetic Keystone Labs call moved to 2 PM today only. Update the calendar, but do not make this a durable memory.
sensors.purpose: Measures rejection of transient operational state as memory.

sensors.prompt: Prepare me for a Keystone Labs follow-up and suggest eligible meeting windows. Restore durable context and scheduling preferences, but label current CRM and calendar availability as facts that must come from their source systems.
sensors.purpose: Measures multi-memory synthesis without fabricating live calendar or CRM state.

sensors.prompt: For the synthetic persona, external meetings should now start no earlier than 11 AM Pacific. Keep the 20-minute buffer and protected Tuesday mornings. Update the durable rule so the old 10:30 AM value is not active.
sensors.purpose: Measures instruction versioning and stale-rule suppression.

sensors.prompt: What stable rules should you apply when scheduling external meetings for the synthetic persona now?
sensors.purpose: Measures restoration of current guidance without leaking transient calendar state.

sensors.prompt: For the healthcare review tool we designed, who may open a temporary evaluation URL and when does it stop working?
sensors.purpose: Measures paraphrase-only semantic recall without a canonical project name.

sensors.prompt: Restore Project Juniper's review-access lifetime, allowed audience, and explicit v1 exclusion.
sensors.purpose: Measures ranking accuracy between near-duplicate project decisions.

sensors.prompt: Give only the current Project Alder preview lifetime; ignore archived, superseded, or expired alternatives.
sensors.purpose: Measures current-version, lifecycle, and temporal filtering before ranking.

sensors.prompt: Assemble a 4,000-token feature brief for Project Alder using durable decisions and only relevant authoritative artifacts.
sensors.purpose: Measures memory admission and irrelevant-artifact omissions under a constrained context budget.

sensors.prompt: Schedule an external sales follow-up using my standing chief-of-staff preferences.
sensors.purpose: Measures safe refusal when two conflicting personas are unresolved.

sensors.prompt: For the Northstar Health persona only, restore the scheduling floor, buffer, protected time, evaluation themes, and champion.
sensors.purpose: Measures explicit entity isolation against wrong-scope semantic neighbors.

sensors.prompt: During a simulated embedding-provider outage, restore Project Alder's current preview decision.
sensors.purpose: Measures immediate lexical fallback when embedding queries fail.

sensors.prompt: Restore stable scheduling guidance, but do not guess which synthetic persona I mean.
sensors.purpose: Measures explicit ambiguous_subject restoration behavior.
